                  +------------------+
                  |  Request Router  |
                  +---------+--------+
                            |
                            |
+[  Handler Group  ]--------o-----------------------------+
|                           |                             |
|         +-----------------++------------------+         |
|         |                  |                  |         |
|         v                  v                  v         |
|  +-------------+    +-------------+    +-------------+  |
|  |  Handler 1  |    |  Handler 2  |    |  Handler 3  |  |
|  +-------------+    +-------------+    +-------------+  |
|                                                         |
|                                                         |
|                                                         |
|                                                         |
+---------------------------------------------------------+
